LanguageData.UB_SNS_hatchetThrower.title: Hatchet thrower
LanguageData.UB_SNS_hatchetThrower.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up with an odd skill of managing to perfectly throw hatchets while hunting and hitting their mark. Though skilled, [PAWN_nameDef] eventually had [PAWN_possessive] hatchets taken away after a minor argument with an officer ended with them in critical condition.
